intentional_holds.reason: ProductVersion stays 0.4.0 during v0.5.x fake import wizard and release-readiness phases until a planned product milestone explicitly approves a bump.
ProductVersion stays 0.4.0 for v0.6.x real-doc planning and safety-closeout phases; a future implementation prompt must separately approve any product milestone bump.
v0.8.0 synthetic governance checkpoint is a planning/checkpoint phase only; productVersion remains 0.7.0 until a separate product-version bump is explicitly approved.

DESIGN.md forbids file pickers, path readers, real uploads, OCR, embeddings, indexing, vector stores, private-vault inspection, and APWU access
DESIGN.md covers Chat, Sources, Saved, Upload, Import, Vault, Settings, /health, and /version
DESIGN.md covers scan density, safety labels, proof-safe output, accessibility/mobile, and no-answer states
